flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Southern Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of Southern Idaho rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (26.7% → 33.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of Southern Idaho fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.8k → $8.0k).
